item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n13","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as a valid fourth optimization iteration with improving metrics, stayed direct, and gave a concrete next-step recommendation: remove a derivable field such as postal code/district, auto-parse it, and use fallback collection only on failure.
